inputs.label: Quarts per Container
inputs.businessContext: Volume of liquid in one container, in quarts (US liquid or Imperial based on type).

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of liquid in one container, in quarts (US liquid or Imperial based on type).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir kaptaki sıvı hacmi, quart cinsinden (türe göre ABD sıvı veya İmparatorluk).
businessContext_i18n.de: Flüssigkeitsvolumen in einem Behälter, in Quarts (US liquid oder Imperial je nach Typ).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume de liquide dans un contenant, en quarts (US liquide ou impérial selon le type).
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen de líquido en un contenedor, en cuartos (US líquido o Imperial según el tipo).

inputs.label: Number of Containers
inputs.businessContext: Total number of containers to be processed or converted.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of containers to be processed or converted.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşlenecek veya dönüştürülecek toplam kap sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der zu verarbeitenden oder umzurechnenden Behälter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de contenants à traiter ou convertir.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de contenedores a procesar o convertir.

inputs.label: Quart Type (0=US Liquid, 1=Imperial)
inputs.businessContext: Specify the quart system: 0 for US liquid quart (0.946352946 L), 1 for Imperial quart (1.1365225 L).

businessContext_i18n.en: Specify the quart system: 0 for US liquid quart (0.946352946 L), 1 for Imperial quart (1.1365225 L).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Quart sistemini belirtin: 0 ABD sıvı quart (0,946352946 L), 1 İmparatorluk quart (1,1365225 L).
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie das Quart-System an: 0 für US liquid quart (0,946352946 L), 1 für Imperial quart (1,1365225 L).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Spécifiez le système de quart : 0 pour le quart liquide US (0,946352946 L), 1 pour le quart impérial (1,1365225 L).
businessContext_i18n.es: Especifique el sistema de cuartos: 0 para cuarto líquido estadounidense (0.946352946 L), 1 para cuarto imperial (1.1365225 L).

inputs.label: Waste Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of additional volume to account for waste, spillage, or safety margin.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of additional volume to account for waste, spillage, or safety margin.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atık, dökülme veya güvenlik marjı için eklenecek ek hacim yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des zusätzlichen Volumens für Abfall, Verschüttung oder Sicherheitsmarge.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de volume supplémentaire pour tenir compte des déchets, des déversements ou de la marge de sécurité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de volumen adicional para contabilizar desperdicios, derrames o margen de seguridad.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
